overall.description: Aerial drone footage descending through a dystopian industrial wasteland in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring decaying circular concrete structures and prominent yellow-black striped cylindrical buildings. The camera transitions from high-altitude surveillance to ground-level traversal through narrow industrial corridors at dusk, with warm orange lighting and hazy atmospheric conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned industrial complex with circular concrete platforms

events.description: camera descends from high altitude toward ground level while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: piloting a drone descending over the industrial wasteland, surveying the circular concrete structures and debris below

entered.detail: large circular concrete foundation with metal railings and industrial equipment
tall cylindrical building with yellow and black hazard stripes
scattered debris and broken concrete scattered across the ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high aerial view of a desolate industrial wasteland at dusk. The camera descends smoothly toward a large circular concrete platform while a prominent yellow-striped cylindrical building remains visible in the mid-ground. The environment is devoid of life, consisting only of rusted metal, broken concrete, and abandoned structures under a hazy orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with prominent yellow cylindrical building

events.description: transitions from aerial descent to ground-level forward movement through the industrial yard
passes the large yellow cylindrical structure revealing CYBER signage on the roof

agents.ego_description: moving forward at ground level through the industrial yard, approaching and circling the large yellow cylindrical building

entered.detail: large metallic letters spelling CYBER on top of the yellow cylindrical building
stacked wooden shipping pallets and industrial materials
metal scaffolding and walkways attached to industrial structures

segments.scene_description: Having reached ground level, the camera moves forward through the open industrial yard toward the prominent yellow cylindrical building. The CYBER signage becomes visible on the roof as the camera approaches. Wooden pallets and metal scaffolding line the path while distant red industrial structures appear on the horizon. The camera circles the yellow building, revealing more of the decaying industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between industrial storage tanks

events.description: enters narrow passage between tall cylindrical industrial structures and concrete walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight industrial corridors between decaying buildings, passing wooden pallets and metal piping

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete walls forming the sides of the narrow industrial corridor
large rusted industrial pipes running along the corridor walls
stacked metal storage containers and industrial crates

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow enclosed corridor between massive industrial structures, leaving the open yard behind. Concrete walls and metal piping line the tight passage while stacked containers block portions of the path ahead. The sky becomes partially obscured by the tall surrounding buildings, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere as the camera continues forward through the decaying industrial maze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera descent from a wide aerial perspective of a desolate wasteland into the claustrophobic depths of an industrial maze. It begins high above a wasteland of rusted metal and broken concrete, gliding downward toward a large circular platform under a hazy orange dusk sky. As the camera reaches ground level, the view opens across an industrial yard filled with wooden pallets and scaffolding, circling a prominent yellow-striped cylindrical building topped with CYBER signage. The scene then shifts from the open expanse toward the horizon's red structures before turning into a narrow enclosed corridor. Finally, the camera pushes through a tight passage of concrete walls and metal piping, where stacked containers and towering buildings obscure the sky to create a sense of confinement.
